tasks.title: Reject empty/whitespace content and tag values in validation functions
tasks.notes: Updated validateCreateInput and validateUpdateInput in src/utils/validation.ts to reject empty/whitespace content (trim check) and empty/whitespace-only tag values.

tasks.title: Add tests for empty/whitespace content and tag validation
tasks.notes: Added 4 unit tests to tests/validation.test.ts and 5 integration tests to tests/notes.test.ts covering all new validation cases.

tasks.title: VERIFY: Input Validation Hardening
